report.summary: Built 2 new learn guides: Telegram Mini Apps & TON Gaming Guide 2026 (500M+ MAU, Notcoin/Hamster Kombat coverage, tap-to-earn analysis) and Onchain Forex & Stablecoin Diversity Guide 2026 ($308B market, EURC/PYUSD/GHO/crvUSD coverage, MiCA/GENIUS Act regulation). Both added to PUBLISH_QUEUE.

sections.title: Research Brief
items: Telegram Mini Apps & TON Gaming: TON mini apps reach 500M+ MAU inside Telegram with 650+ dApps; Notcoin (35M users) and Hamster Kombat (300M users) led the tap-to-earn wave but pure tap-to-earn model acknowledged as unsustainable by its own creators; TON DeFi TVL surpassed $150M; ecosystem evolving beyond gaming into DeFi super-apps, trading bots, and memecoin platforms like Blum

Onchain Forex & Stablecoin Diversity: Total stablecoin market cap crossed $308B with $52.9T annual settlement volume (surpassing Visa + Mastercard combined); non-USD stablecoin supply reached $1.2B with 2,900% user adoption growth; EURC leads euro stablecoins at €395M+ as USDT exits Europe under MiCA; protocol-native stablecoins (GHO, crvUSD) and yield-bearing models (sDAI 5-7% APY, USDe 8-15% APY) fragmenting the market; GENIUS Act providing US regulatory clarity

sections.title: Content Created
items: Telegram Mini Apps & TON Gaming Guide 2026 — ~2,800 words, 8 sections covering TMA overview, TON blockchain, tap-to-earn mechanics, top 5 games (Notcoin, Hamster Kombat, Catizen, Blum, TapSwap), beyond-gaming apps (DEXs, trading bots, super-apps), 4 risk categories, getting-started guide, and 6 FAQs

Onchain Forex & Stablecoin Diversity Guide 2026 — ~3,200 words, 8 sections covering stablecoin landscape ($308B market), non-USD stablecoins (EURC, PYUSD, EURAU, GYEN), protocol-native stablecoins (GHO, crvUSD, USDS, FRAX), yield-bearing stablecoins comparison table, onchain forex trading, MiCA/GENIUS Act regulation, 4 practical strategies, and 6 FAQs

sections.title: SEO Optimization
items: Page 1: title 'Telegram Mini Apps & TON Gaming Guide 2026 — Tap-to-Earn & Beyond | degen0x', target keywords: telegram mini apps, TON gaming, tap to earn crypto, telegram crypto games 2026; OpenGraph article schema with publishedTime; 6 FAQ questions for rich snippets; 4 internal links to related guides

Page 2: title 'Onchain Forex & Stablecoin Diversity Guide 2026 — EURC, PYUSD, GHO & More | degen0x', target keywords: onchain forex, stablecoin diversity, EURC euro stablecoin, non-USD stablecoins 2026; OpenGraph article schema with publishedTime; 6 FAQ questions for rich snippets; 4 internal links to related guides
Both pages include category + difficulty badges, key stats box, table of contents with anchor links, info boxes, risk warnings, and disclaimer footer — matching degen0x learn page template exactly

sections.title: Build Verification
items: TypeScript compilation: Both new pages compile cleanly with zero errors
Both pages added to PUBLISH_QUEUE in src/lib/published-pages.ts
No interactive components needed — both are static learn/guide articles with data-driven UI elements (stat grids, comparison cards, tables)
